query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_products,
  SUM(CASE WHEN `sheetRowNumber` IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_sheet_row_number,
  SUM(CASE WHEN `lastSheetSyncedAt` IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_last_sheet_synced_at,
  SUM(CASE WHEN `sheetRowNumber` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_sheet_row_number,
  COUNT(DISTINCT `sheetRowNumber`) AS distinct_sheet_row_numbers
FROM products
WHERE `poNumber` = 'PO-20260512-03';
command:

  COUNT(*) AS total_products,
  SUM(CASE WHEN `sheetRowNumber` IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_sheet_row_number,
  SUM(CASE WHEN `lastSheetSyncedAt` IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_last_sheet_synced_at,
  SUM(CASE WHEN `sheetRowNumber` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_sheet_row_number,
  COUNT(DISTINCT `sheetRowNumber`) AS distinct_sheet_row_numbers
FROM products
WHERE `poNumber` = 'PO-20260512-03';
